/bin/zsh -lc "cd backend && python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

from app.db import (
    AssetKind,
    AssetStatus,
    Base,
    BeatSheet,
    CharacterSheet,
    CompositionJob,
    CompositionJobKind,
    Genre,
    JobStatus,
    Pitch,
    StoryBrief,
    StoryOutline,
    StorySession,
    StorySetup,
    ToneProfile,
    make_engine,
)
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.assets import SessionAssetService
from app.services.sessions import SessionService
from app.settings import load_settings
from app.storage import build_object_storage_service

settings = load_settings(
    {
        'STORYTELLER_SECRETS_FILE': '',
        'STORYTELLER_ENVIRONMENT': 'development',
        'STORYTELLER_DATABASE_URL': 'postgresql+psycopg://storyteller:storyteller@localhost:8567/storyteller',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_ENDPOINT': 'http://localhost:8568',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_PROJECT_ID': 'storyteller-local',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_PUBLIC_URL': 'http://localhost:8568',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_SESSIONS_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-sessions',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_AUDIO_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-audio',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_EXPORTS_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-exports',
        'STORYTELLER_GEMINI_API_KEY': 'browser-qa-placeholder',
    },
)
engine = make_engine(settings.database_url)
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, expire_on_commit=False)
object_storage = build_object_storage_service(settings)

now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
recovered_story_text = (
    'Draft segment 1 settles the harbor in silver hush.\\n\\n'
    'Draft segment 2 keeps the bell audible while the cove stays calm enough to resume after refresh.'
)

with SessionLocal() as session:
    service = SessionService(session)
    genre = Genre(
        slug='quest-fantasy',
        label='Quest Fantasy',
        description='A gentle harbor adventure.',
    )
    tone = ToneProfile(
        genre=genre,
        slug='hushed-wonder',
        label='Hushed Wonder',
        description='Soft and luminous.',
    )
    session.add_all([genre, tone])
    session.flush()

    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='Prompt 68 Browser QA')
    story_session = session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)
    assert story_session is not None
    story_session.selected_genre = genre
    story_session.selected_tone_profile = tone
    session.flush()

    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f'Accepted {stage.value}.',
        )

    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail='Writing paused after an autosave checkpoint.',
    )

    brief = StoryBrief(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        raw_brief='A harbor fox follows a silver clue and returns home calm.',
        normalized_summary='A bedtime harbor mystery with a gentle emotional repair.',
        planning_notes='Keep the midpoint safe and sleepy.',
        is_active=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(brief)
    session.flush()

    pitch = Pitch(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        story_brief_id=brief.id,
        generation_key='browser-qa-batch',
        pitch_index=1,
        title='The Silver Bell Buoy',
        logline='A harbor fox follows a bell across moonlit water.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pitch)
    session.flush()

    character_sheet = CharacterSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        pitch_id=pitch.id,
        revision_number=1,
        title='Mira and the Bell',
        protagonist_name='Mira',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(character_sheet)
    session.flush()

    beat_sheet = BeatSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        character_sheet_id=character_sheet.id,
        revision_number=1,
        summary='A soft Save-the-Cat arc.',
        beats=[
            {
                'key': 'opening_image',
                'label': 'Opening Image',
                'order': 1,
                'summary': 'Mira watches the harbor settle under soft moonlight.',
                'emotional_intent': 'Begin in stillness and wonder.',
            },
            {
                'key': 'midpoint',
                'label': 'Midpoint',
                'order': 2,
                'summary': 'Mira finds the hidden cove where the bell belongs.',
                'emotional_intent': 'Lift wonder while keeping the surprise soft.',
            },
        ],
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(beat_sheet)
    session.flush()

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1600,
        target_runtime_minutes=11,
        chapter_count=3,
        approximate_scene_count=9,
        chapter_style='three gentle chapters',
        guidance_notes='End each chapter with a calmer image than it began.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(story_setup)
    session.flush()

    story_outline = StoryOutline(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
        revision_number=1,
        outline_kind='chapter',
        summary='Three draftable chapters mapped from the beat sheet.',
        cards=[
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-1',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 1,
                'title': 'Chapter 1: Opening Harbor',
                'summary': 'Set the moonlit harbor mood and launch Mira after the drifting bell.',
                'beat_keys': ['opening_image'],
                'beat_labels': ['Opening Image'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Move from stillness toward gentle motion.',
            },
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-2',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 2,
                'title': 'Chapter 2: Lantern Cove',
                'summary': 'Let Mira discover the quieter cove and keep the reveal soft.',
                'beat_keys': ['midpoint'],
                'beat_labels': ['Midpoint'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Lift wonder without breaking the bedtime tone.',
            },
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-3',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 3,
                'title': 'Chapter 3: Harbor Rest',
                'summary': 'Guide the harbor back into rest.',
                'beat_keys': ['finale'],
                'beat_labels': ['Finale'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Turn temporary doubt into visible relief and belonging.',
            },
        ],
        metadata_json={
            'genre_label': 'Quest Fantasy',
            'tone_label': 'Hushed Wonder',
            'target_word_count': 1600,
        },
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(story_outline)
    session.flush()

    composition_job = CompositionJob(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
        job_kind=CompositionJobKind.DRAFT,
        status=JobStatus.PAUSED,
        progress_percent=38,
        current_segment_index=2,
        metadata_json={
            'total_segments': 3,
            'start_segment_index': 1,
            'story_outline_id': story_outline.id,
            'story_outline_revision_number': 1,
        },
        started_at=now,
    )
    session.add(composition_job)
    session.flush()
    session.commit()

    location = object_storage.paths.draft_text_snapshot(session_id=snapshot.id)
    upload_metadata = object_storage.upload_text(
        location,
        recovered_story_text,
        content_type='text/markdown; charset=utf-8',
    )
    SessionAssetService(session).upsert_asset_record(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        asset_kind=AssetKind.DRAFT_TEXT_SNAPSHOT,
        storage_bucket=location.bucket,
        object_path=location.key,
        mime_type='text/markdown',
        status=AssetStatus.READY,
        composition_job_id=composition_job.id,
        segment_index=2,
        byte_size=upload_metadata.size_bytes,
        metadata_json={
            'orchestration_version': 'composition_draft_snapshot.v1',
            'checkpoint_reason': 'browser_qa_seed',
            'autosave_strategy': 'rolling_session_latest',
            'job_kind': composition_job.job_kind.value,
            'job_status': composition_job.status.value,
            'current_segment_index': 2,
            'total_segments': 3,
            'progress_percent': 38,
        },
    )
    print(snapshot.id)

object_storage.close()
engine.dispose()
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "cd backend && python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

from app.db import (
    AssetKind,
    AssetStatus,
    Base,
    BeatSheet,
    CharacterSheet,
    CompositionJob,
    CompositionJobKind,
    Genre,
    JobStatus,
    Pitch,
    StoryBrief,
    StoryOutline,
    StorySession,
    StorySetup,
    ToneProfile,
    make_engine,
)
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.assets import SessionAssetService
from app.services.catalog import CATALOG_FILE_PATH, load_catalog_document, seed_catalog
from app.services.sessions import SessionService
from app.settings import load_settings
from app.storage import build_object_storage_service

settings = load_settings(
    {
        'STORYTELLER_SECRETS_FILE': '',
        'STORYTELLER_ENVIRONMENT': 'development',
        'STORYTELLER_DATABASE_URL': 'postgresql+psycopg://storyteller:storyteller@localhost:8567/storyteller',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_ENDPOINT': 'http://localhost:8568',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_PROJECT_ID': 'storyteller-local',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_PUBLIC_URL': 'http://localhost:8568',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_SESSIONS_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-sessions',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_AUDIO_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-audio',
        'STORYTELLER_GCS_EXPORTS_BUCKET_NAME': 'storyteller-exports',
        'STORYTELLER_GEMINI_API_KEY': 'browser-qa-placeholder',
    },
)
engine = make_engine(settings.database_url)
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, expire_on_commit=False)
object_storage = build_object_storage_service(settings)

now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
recovered_story_text = (
    'Draft segment 1 settles the harbor in silver hush.\\n\\n'
    'Draft segment 2 keeps the bell audible while the cove stays calm enough to resume after refresh.'
)

with SessionLocal() as session:
    seed_catalog(session, load_catalog_document(CATALOG_FILE_PATH))
    genre = session.execute(select(Genre).where(Genre.slug == 'quest-fantasy')).scalar_one()
    tone = session.execute(
        select(ToneProfile).where(ToneProfile.slug == 'hushed-wonder')
    ).scalar_one()

    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='Prompt 68 Browser QA')
    story_session = session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)
    assert story_session is not None
    story_session.selected_genre = genre
    story_session.selected_tone_profile = tone
    session.flush()

    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f'Accepted {stage.value}.',
        )

    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail='Writing paused after an autosave checkpoint.',
    )

    brief = StoryBrief(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        raw_brief='A harbor fox follows a silver clue and returns home calm.',
        normalized_summary='A bedtime harbor mystery with a gentle emotional repair.',
        planning_notes='Keep the midpoint safe and sleepy.',
        is_active=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(brief)
    session.flush()

    pitch = Pitch(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        story_brief_id=brief.id,
        generation_key='browser-qa-batch',
        pitch_index=1,
        title='The Silver Bell Buoy',
        logline='A harbor fox follows a bell across moonlit water.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(pitch)
    session.flush()

    character_sheet = CharacterSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        pitch_id=pitch.id,
        revision_number=1,
        title='Mira and the Bell',
        protagonist_name='Mira',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(character_sheet)
    session.flush()

    beat_sheet = BeatSheet(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        character_sheet_id=character_sheet.id,
        revision_number=1,
        summary='A soft Save-the-Cat arc.',
        beats=[
            {
                'key': 'opening_image',
                'label': 'Opening Image',
                'order': 1,
                'summary': 'Mira watches the harbor settle under soft moonlight.',
                'emotional_intent': 'Begin in stillness and wonder.',
            },
            {
                'key': 'midpoint',
                'label': 'Midpoint',
                'order': 2,
                'summary': 'Mira finds the hidden cove where the bell belongs.',
                'emotional_intent': 'Lift wonder while keeping the surprise soft.',
            },
        ],
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(beat_sheet)
    session.flush()

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1600,
        target_runtime_minutes=11,
        chapter_count=3,
        approximate_scene_count=9,
        chapter_style='three gentle chapters',
        guidance_notes='End each chapter with a calmer image than it began.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(story_setup)
    session.flush()

    story_outline = StoryOutline(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
        revision_number=1,
        outline_kind='chapter',
        summary='Three draftable chapters mapped from the beat sheet.',
        cards=[
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-1',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 1,
                'title': 'Chapter 1: Opening Harbor',
                'summary': 'Set the moonlit harbor mood and launch Mira after the drifting bell.',
                'beat_keys': ['opening_image'],
                'beat_labels': ['Opening Image'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Move from stillness toward gentle motion.',
            },
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-2',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 2,
                'title': 'Chapter 2: Lantern Cove',
                'summary': 'Let Mira discover the quieter cove and keep the reveal soft.',
                'beat_keys': ['midpoint'],
                'beat_labels': ['Midpoint'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Lift wonder without breaking the bedtime tone.',
            },
            {
                'card_key': 'chapter-3',
                'card_type': 'chapter',
                'position': 3,
                'title': 'Chapter 3: Harbor Rest',
                'summary': 'Guide the harbor back into rest.',
                'beat_keys': ['finale'],
                'beat_labels': ['Finale'],
                'emotional_shift': 'Turn temporary doubt into visible relief and belonging.',
            },
        ],
        metadata_json={
            'genre_label': 'Quest Fantasy',
            'tone_label': 'Hushed Wonder',
            'target_word_count': 1600,
        },
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=now,
    )
    session.add(story_outline)
    session.flush()

    composition_job = CompositionJob(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
        story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
        job_kind=CompositionJobKind.DRAFT,
        status=JobStatus.PAUSED,
        progress_percent=38,
        current_segment_index=2,
        metadata_json={
            'total_segments': 3,
            'start_segment_index': 1,
            'story_outline_id': story_outline.id,
            'story_outline_revision_number': 1,
        },
        started_at=now,
    )
    session.add(composition_job)
    session.flush()
    session.commit()

    location = object_storage.paths.draft_text_snapshot(session_id=snapshot.id)
    upload_metadata = object_storage.upload_text(
        location,
        recovered_story_text,
        content_type='text/markdown; charset=utf-8',
    )
    SessionAssetService(session).upsert_asset_record(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        asset_kind=AssetKind.DRAFT_TEXT_SNAPSHOT,
        storage_bucket=location.bucket,
        object_path=location.key,
        mime_type='text/markdown',
        status=AssetStatus.READY,
        composition_job_id=composition_job.id,
        segment_index=2,
        byte_size=upload_metadata.size_bytes,
        metadata_json={
            'orchestration_version': 'composition_draft_snapshot.v1',
            'checkpoint_reason': 'browser_qa_seed',
            'autosave_strategy': 'rolling_session_latest',
            'job_kind': composition_job.job_kind.value,
            'job_status': composition_job.status.value,
            'current_segment_index': 2,
            'total_segments': 3,
            'progress_percent': 38,
        },
    )
    print(snapshot.id)

object_storage.close()
engine.dispose()
PY"
